name: Content improvement
about: Propose better structure, explanation quality, or self-check design
title: "[content] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Scope

What direction/track/section is affected.

## Problem

What is weak now (clarity, structure, consistency, self-check, terminology).

## Proposal

Describe the improvement in practical terms.

## Contract alignment

Confirm alignment with `docs/content_contract.md` and `docs/naming_convention.md`.

## Notes

Anything else that can help with implementation.
